all_text_content:
Verse of the Day
And the children of Israel did evil again in the sight of the Lord; and the Lord delivered them into the hand of the Philistines forty years.
Judges 13:1
Quote of the Day
"The more we identify with and remember Jesus Christ, the more we want to be like Him."
Elder Dale G. Renlund | 1 Oct 2025General Conference
